user_query: has there been any update to the remote work rules?
final_answer_preview:
Yes. There was an update published as the Remote Work Policy 2025, last updated on 2025-01-10 ( authored by the HR Team ).

Key points of the updated policy:
- Model: hybrid-first approach
- Remote work limit: up to 3 days per week
- Home office budget: €500 one-time plus €100/year recurring
- In-office anchor days: mandatory in-office on Tuesdays and Thursdays
- International remote: up to 30 day
